omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Your Podcasts: The most important thing we collect from you are your podcast subscriptions/follows, up next queue, episode filters, episode data, and settings configuration.

Log information: Like most online service providers, we collect information that web browsers, mobile devices, and servers typically make available, including the browser type, IP address, unique device identifiers, language preference, referring site, the date and time of access, operating system, and mobile network information. We collect log information when you use our Services — for example, when you log into your account, listen to a podcast, or modify your podcast subscriptions/follows.

Log information: Like most online service providers, we collect information that web browsers, mobile devices, and servers typically make available, including the browser type, IP address, unique device identifiers, language preference, referring site, the date and time of access, operating system, and mobile network information. We collect log information when you use our Services — for example, when you log into your account, listen to a podcast, or modify your podcast subscriptions/follows.

Device and Usage Information: We collect information about your device including the device make and model, your wireless carrier, a device ID, some basic device settings like font size and language, and how you use our Services. In addition, in the event our App(s) crash on your mobile device, we will receive additional information about your device and session, which allows us to identify and fix bugs and otherwise improve the performance of our App(s).
• Account Information: To use the core features of our Services, you must register and open an “Account” with us by providing your name, email address, and a password.
• Characteristics protected by law (for example, you might provide your gender as part of a research survey for us);

• Transactional Information: If you choose to purchase a subscription to Pocket Casts Plus, we may collect information to complete and record the transaction. For example, we'll collect information, like your name and credit card information, to process those payments. We also keep a record of the purchases you've made.

• Transactional Information: If you choose to purchase a subscription to Pocket Casts Plus, we may collect information to complete and record the transaction. For example, we'll collect information, like your name and credit card information, to process those payments. We also keep a record of the purchases you've made.

• Location Information: We may determine the approximate location of your device from your IP address. We collect and use this information to understand where our users are located so we can identify what features might be meaningful to them.

• Communications with Us: You may also provide us with information when you provide us feedback or communicate with our support team. When you communicate with us via form, email, phone, or otherwise, we store a copy of our communications (including any call recordings as permitted by applicable law). You can choose not to provide us with certain information, but this may limit the features of the Services you are able to use.
